title: Verify Standard Recipe Public Authoring Surface
forbids: standard stages deriving raw op envelopes, open public config schemas, unexpected public keys, or step focus paths that bypass named public config fields
why: This rule is a package-derived authoring-model currentness guard over the exact standard recipe. Static source/file shape for stage authoring belongs to Grit-backed Habitat patterns.
remediate: Update the standard stage authoring model intentionally, keep raw operation envelopes behind named public config keys, and use Grit-backed recipe-stage patterns for source/file-shape ownership.
message: Standard stage derived authoring model drifted.
